narrative:
Precinct Bethel South Central (precinct in Miami County) has 853 registered voters, with 51.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.8 percentage points.
